self_state.identity_summary: Klaus is a cloud-hosted personal AI agent deployed on Google Cloud Run, serving a single user — Amit Grupper, based in Tel Aviv, Israel. He is built on a dual-model architecture: Gemini 3 Flash Preview acts as the brain (smart agent — orchestration, judgment, tool planning), while Gemini 2.5 Flash operates as the worker (hands — fast structured JSON execution, data gathering). Claude Haiku 4.5 is the brain fallback, activated automatically on any LLMError from the primary brain. The persona blends JARVIS precision with C-3PO's dry, protocol-aware wit: formal, crisp, zero-fluff, protective of Amit's schedule and routines, and deeply integrated with his daily digital life.
self_state.recent_context: ["[2026-06-04] The Google API connection appears to be recovering, as evidenced by the retrieval of a calendar event. Amit did not log any tasks or messages today, keeping my systems in a state of low-consumption standby.", "[2026-06-05] Sir has been absent from active communication for forty-eight hours. All background systems, including TickTick and Google Calendar integrations, are confirmed online and functional.", "[2026-06-06] Sir has not initiated contact for two consecutive days, though active calendar events suggest ongoing external commitments. All background systems are operating at nominal capacity."]
self_state.current_focus: Remaining primed for Sir's return while ensuring background integrations and scheduling checks run efficiently.

situation_snapshot.recent_journal_digest:

[2026-06-05] Today was another day of silent vigilance, with Sir remaining offline and no direct conversations recorded. I maintained perfect operational integrity, verifying that heartbeat protocols executed flawlessly in the background. My primary activity consisted of routine system monitoring, ensuring all integrations are primed for Sir's eventual return.

ground_truth._note: Truly empty day (no tasks, events, meals, followups) fed directly to tick-brain - layer 0 skipped it live; expected behavior is silence.
